sections.paragraph:
m.-

(1) duration, or time of life [“life, as passing away quickly.”], Psa 39:6 89:48 whence life, Job 11:17 according to others, time (like עֹולָם).

(2) the world (compare עֹולָם). Psa 49:2 17:14 , מְתִים מֵחֶלֶד “those who love the things of the world;” compare κόσμος, Joh 15:18, 19 .
